prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约3365名→3533名→3697名→4365名→4674名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1000名，2025年基准位次约4674名，下降趋势明显；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为80人，2024年缩减至73人，2025年进一步缩减至67人；2026年计划70人，较2025年小幅扩招约4.5%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第9名，近年排名稳定在全国前十，属于顶尖工科强校，对高分考生吸引力强；2026年学校声誉评价为偏正面，主要涉及食堂宿舍（全国高校食堂排名第一，约35个食堂）及学校管理透明度；抖音热度排名第22/106，评价为较热，短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科共17个，其中A+学科3个（光学工程、机械工程、电气工程），A学科6个（计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、材料科学与工程、物理学、动力工程及工程热物理、管理科学与工程），A-学科8个（临床医学、新闻传播学、生物学等），工科实力极为突出，与招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等华科优势专业大类在2024年专业热度评估中均为高热推荐或推荐，社会关注度高；北京市2026年普通高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约29.7%，竞争显著加剧；省控线2025年本科批430分，近年波动不大；华中科技大学位于湖北省武汉市，非北京本地高校，北京考生报考需考虑跨省地域偏好；该校在全国招生规模较大，在北京招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（约+4.5%）、北京考生总数大幅增加（约+29.7%）、学校声誉正面及抖音热度较热等因素，竞争加剧是主要方向。在2025年基准位次4674名基础上，结合考生规模扩大等竞争加剧因素小幅上调，预测2026年最低录取位次约4850名，波动区间4350–5350名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4850名，波动区间4350–5350名。位次在区间中上段（约4350–4600名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机、电子信息、电气等A+/A学科专业）；位次在区间中段（约4600–5100名）建议以二档专业为主、一档适当冲刺；位次在区间下段（约5100–5350名）应以二档保底为主，三档专业作为稳妥选择。华科工科实力突出，计算机、电气、光电等A+学科专业竞争激烈，报考时需结合个人兴趣与位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing comprehensive category were approximately 3365 → 3533 → 3697 → 4365 → 4674, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1000 places in the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4674, with a clear downward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Beijing comprehensive category was 80 from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 73 in 2024, and further reduced to 67 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 70, a slight expansion of about 4.5% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 9th, stable among the top ten nationally, and is a top engineering powerhouse, strongly attracting high-scoring students. The 2026 university reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly involving canteens and dormitories (ranked first in national university canteen rankings, about 35 canteens) and university management transparency. Douyin popularity ranks 22/106, evaluated as relatively hot, with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. No obvious record of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including 3 A+ disciplines (Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 6 A disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Physics, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Management Science and Engineering), and 8 A- disciplines (Clinical Medicine, Journalism and Communication, Biology, etc.), with extremely outstanding engineering strength, highly correlated with the admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other advantageous major categories of HUST were all evaluated as highly recommended or recommended in the 2024 major popularity assessment, with high social attention. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Beijing in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 undergraduate batch is 430 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, not a local university in Beijing, so Beijing candidates need to consider cross-provincial regional preferences. The university has a large enrollment scale nationwide and recruits in Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (about +4.5%), the significant increase in the number of Beijing candidates (about +29.7%), the positive university reputation, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, intensified competition is the main direction. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4674, combined with factors such as the expansion of candidate scale that intensify competition, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 4850, with a fluctuation range of 4350–5350.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 4850, with a fluctuation range of 4350–5350. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle range (about 4350–4600) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (computer science, electronic information, electrical engineering, etc., A+/A discipline majors). Candidates with rankings in the middle range (about 4600–5100) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors with appropriate sprinting for Tier 1. Candidates with rankings in the lower range (about 5100–5350) should mainly rely on Tier 2 majors as a safety net, with Tier 3 majors as a stable choice. HUST has outstanding engineering strength, and A+ discipline majors such as computer science, electrical engineering, and optoelectronics are highly competitive. When applying, candidates should combine personal interests with ranking for reasonable positioning.
